raw_text:
✅ Assessment: Phase 17 + Phase 18 are eligible for closure — conditional on one last verification sweep.

You’ve hit the real finish line criteria for “Truth at Scale” and “Production Ops/Security” if the repo passes a clean, reproducible integrated run now that containers are healthy.

What you accomplished (the parts that matter)

Deterministic correctness at scale: 100-tenant simulation with stable digests ✅

Rebuildability + replay governance: blue/green rebuild + replay certification ✅

Audit as an enforced control plane: append-only + mutation_class policy + oracle completeness ✅

Operational maturity: DR drill (restore→rebuild→oracle pass), RBAC, tenant-aware rate limiting, release artifacts+checksums, compliance exports ✅
These are the right “production truth” milestones.

Closure is conditional on a single “no excuses” validation sweep

Because you had crash-looping and migration mismatch mid-session, you need one final pass that proves current HEAD is coherent.

Required sweep (run in this order)

Bring infra up clean

docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.infrastructure.yml up -d

Confirm all containers healthy

Run migrations the same way prod will

Either via your tenantctl fleet migrate (preferred) or module startup migrator

Confirm schema versions align with /api/version

Full integrated E2E pass (real PG + real NATS)

cargo test -p e2e-tests -- --nocapture

Run the DR drill once

bash tools/backup/dr_drill_restore_rebuild.sh (or your actual script name)

Run the 100-tenant capstone once

Whatever command you standardized for bd-17c4 (simulation harness + digest check)

Pass/Fail rule

PASS = all 5 steps succeed on a clean start, no manual nudges.

FAIL = anything flakey or order-dependent → we open a single remediation bead: “bd-18x: E2E reliability lock” and fix only what the sweep reveals.

What I need from you to stamp “CLOSED”

Paste the outputs (just summaries are fine):

cargo test -p e2e-tests final line

DR drill final line (oracle pass + digest)

100-tenant capstone final line (digest stability)

If those are green, I’ll give the formal: Phase 17 CLOSED and Phase 18 CLOSED stamp with the minimal “what’s next” set (Phase 19 proposal).
